venn "PRISMA 2024 — systematic review database overlap"
set pubmed   "PubMed"
set embase   "Embase"
set cochrane "Cochrane"

pubmed only                 : 412
embase only                 : 289
cochrane only               : 67
pubmed & embase             : 134
pubmed & cochrane           : 23
embase & cochrane           : 19
pubmed & embase & cochrane  : 78
